_comment2: Controls packet capture behavior including fragment reassembly
_mode_options: auto | sniff | socket - auto tries eBPF, then sniff
_allow_parallel_comment: Set true for shadow/mirror mode coexistence

fragment_reassembly._comment: IP fragment reassembly for SNMP traps exceeding MTU
fragment_reassembly._enabled_comment: Enable for sniff mode when large traps (>1472 bytes) are expected
fragment_reassembly._timeout_comment: Time to wait for all fragments (increase for high-latency networks)
fragment_reassembly._max_buffer_comment: Maximum memory for fragment reassembly buffer
fragment_reassembly._max_datagrams_comment: Maximum concurrent incomplete datagrams to track
